prose:
Method–provenance summary:
Property: largest electrophilic Fukui function f⁺ for acrolein (β-carbon)
Level of theory: DFT tier “standard” = B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI-JK density fitting (PySCF)
Geometry provenance: single-point on user-supplied acrolein.xyz (no re-optimization)
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
Charge 0, multiplicity 1; N+1 cation (charge +1, mult 2) and N–1 anion (charge –1, mult 2) for Fukui ± calculations
Software backend: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill → PySCF 2.x
Convergence: all three SCFs converged; integrity checker marks charge conservation OK. Warnings echoed below.
